plan.reasoning: Selected Wyndham Garden Austin as it perfectly meets all user requirements: (1) Pet-friendly ✓, (2) Outdoor pool ✓, (3) Free parking ✓, (4) Rate per night of $80 is well under the $150 budget, and (5) Total cost of $239 for 3 nights ($67/night before taxes) provides excellent value. This hotel offers the best combination of all three required amenities at the lowest price point among candidates. Hotel 1 lacks pet-friendly amenities, Hotel 2 lacks pet-friendly amenities, Hotel 3 has paid parking (not free), and Hotel 4 appears to be just a room listing without the required amenities. The Wyndham Garden also includes bonus amenities like hot tub, room service, and airport shuttle, making it the clear best choice.
plan.final_message_to_user: Great news! I found the perfect hotel for your Austin trip from July 10-13, 2026. The Wyndham Garden Austin checks all your boxes - it's pet-friendly, has an outdoor pool, offers free parking, and comes in at just $80/night (well under your $150 budget). For 3 nights, your total is $239. You'll also enjoy extras like a hot tub, room service, and complimentary airport shuttle. This 3-star hotel has a solid 4.0 rating and provides excellent value for your stay!
